data:
hi guys,
i thought having a group chat would be good for us.
what do you think?
over to you our leaders (<@u03u1hag9tr> and <@u03ug4q7v42>)
i have been missing deadlines and i am trying catching up but not missing the current ones either. hahah
so i'm going to create a Michelle organization. i will send the link here
in the mean time lets all read the document throughly and meet to talk about it later today? what time should we meet <@u03u1hag9tr>?
i suggest 5 p.m (during independent work). that's after the last tutorial session for today.
that sound good if everyone agrees
i am good with that time!
actually you can check your emails for an invite to the organization:grinning:
do we clone or fork the repository <@u03u1hag9tr>
